title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Titan Eyeplus

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Titan Eyeplus
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a SEO Specialist in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
